steps: Prepare your sample- Cultures flask- Drop between slide and coverslip and invert the slide so that the objective is on side of coverslip Use x 40 objective for most cultures and x20 for dinoflagellates Install and start Infinitity Capture software
Infinity X - 800x608 (4:3) resolution for color videos - Note that only part of the field is visible but files are smaller than with full resolution Infinity 3-6 UR 1024x768 ou 1600x1200 a
Use 960x728 ( 4:3 ) resolution (binning) for BW videos - Note that the full field is visible a
Modify the AVI setups Launch acquisition (usually only 10-20 sec at a time) a
Infinity X - Full resolution 1920x1080 (16:9) - Note : very large AVI files ! 30 sec = 700 Mo Infinity 3UR-6 - Full resolution 2752 x 2192 a
Advantage : Very easy to do Disadvantage : Files are store as avi and are very very large...
Need to buy the software (40 euros only) Advantage : Much smaller files and the software allow to finalize the films
Setup the resolution in Image Capture Shut donw Image Capture Launch Video de Luxe Select in menu : Video Recording (Enregistrement video) Slect the USB Camera - DShow (see next step)
1280x720 (16:9) for selecting only center of camera field a
Create a new movie Select the parts you want to add Cut the scenes Optimum duration is 20-30 sec max a

Export to wmv format (Windows Movie - this is the most compact format without loss of resolution) Choose a format with same aspect ratio than original Do not add sound unless you want to add music For 16:9 : 640 x 360 or 1280 x 720 For 4:3 : 640 x480 a
Set up configuration as follows (item 3 in previous step) Infinity X - Resolution 1280 x720 Infinity 3-6UR - Resolution 1024x768 (4:3) Ratio 16:9 a
creator: Daniel Vaulot
